iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 19:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IAEA hidden HEU (460kg of 60%, enough for 11 bombs) remains the dominant factor. Gap between capability and intent persists — no weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test. Hegseth 'no quarter' rhetoric + 112 killed in Kurdistan may increase desperation calculus over time but no direct nuclear signal. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 19:00 — IMMINENT RISING. ESCALATION CONTINUES: (1) Iran launches SIXTH wave of strikes on Saturday — sustained multi-axis assault (BBC). (2) Kuwait air base hit by 2 Iranian drones — Gulf state targeting now extends beyond UAE (BBC). (3) 112 killed, 969 injured in Iran's Kurdistan from US-Israeli strikes — massive civilian casualties (Al Jazeera). (4) Hamas urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks — unusual pressure from Iran's key ally (AJ/BBC). (5) BBC confirms Kharg Island targeted — Iran's largest oil export terminal. (6) Iran continues intensified attacks across Gulf states. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 19:00 — IMMINENT RISING. Ground invasion ongoing. No ceasefire developments. Egypt/France diplomatic efforts continue without result. Status unchanged from 18:00 scan. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new intercepts since third confirmed March 13. Article 4 consultations remain one-intercept threshold away. Iran's expanding Gulf strikes (now Kuwait) may redirect attention from Turkey corridor. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new developments. India remains diplomatically engaged but no military escalation signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No major new developments. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil while selling at discount. Kharg Island strikes may further disrupt oil markets to Russia's benefit. 42 (stable).

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China has not responded to Trump's Hormuz warship request. Warplane flights near Taiwan remain low. China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. No new signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed — same event as 18:00 scan (Reuters/Bloomberg/Japan Times/Chosun). Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. Japan confirms 340km range into Sea of Japan. No new launches since. 41 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 430 drones + 68 missiles attack from earlier today still dominant signal. No new Ukraine developments this hour. Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day. 56 + 5 (coupling) = 61.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 19:00. (1) Afghan claim of killing 14 Pakistani soldiers remains unconfirmed but unrefuted — Pakistan has not denied. (2) Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar burning after Pakistan strike (Reuters). (3) No Pakistani response announcement yet to Afghan soldier kill claim. Watch for escalation trigger. 80 (stable).

IRGC ORDERS EVACUATION OF DUBAI, ABU DHABI, FUJAIRAH PORTS — calls UAE 'legitimate targets' (CNN/Reuters/Al Jazeera)
HAMAS URGES IRAN TO HALT GULF ATTACKS — unusual pressure from Iran's key ally (Al Jazeera/BBC)
FUJAIRAH OIL TERMINAL HIT — loading suspended, one of world's largest bunkering hubs offline (Reuters/CNN)
AFGHANISTAN CLAIMS KILLED 14 PAKISTANI SOLDIERS AND CAPTURED BORDER POST — major escalation if confirmed (Newsday/LA Times)
ISRAEL 'MASSIVE' LEBANON GROUND INVASION — 'do what we did in Gaza' — seize area south of Litani (Axios/ToI)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NO DE-ESCALATION. Day 15 19:00 SCAN. Global war probability IMMINENT (76%, up from 75%). NEW: Iran now attacking Kuwait — third Gulf state targeted (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait). Sixth wave of strikes confirms sustained Iranian campaign. 112 killed in Kurdistan raises civilian casualty threshold. Hamas publicly urging Iran to stop Gulf attacks — extraordinary fracture in Iran's alliance network. SEVEN trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (80), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Kuwait escalation — if Iran strikes Kuwait again, triggers Gulf-wide defense response. (b) Hamas break with Iran strategy — may signal wider Arab world distancing from Iran. (c) Kurdistan civilian death toll climbing — 112 dead could fuel Iranian domestic mobilization. (d) Pakistan response to Afghan soldier kill claim still pending.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches sixth wave of strikes on Saturday — sustained multi-axis assault
latest_news.text: Israel confirms Iran has launched a sixth wave of strikes on Saturday. Sustained Iranian offensive targeting Israel and Gulf state assets. Multi-axis assault continues through the evening.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait air base hit by 2 Iranian drones — Gulf targeting expands
latest_news.text: An air base in Kuwait was hit by two Iranian drones on Saturday. Iran's targeting of Gulf states now extends to a third country — UAE, Saudi Arabia, and now Kuwait. BBC confirmed in live coverage.

latest_news.headline: 112 killed, 969 injured in Iran's Kurdistan from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.text: Local officials in Iran's Kurdistan province report at least 112 killed and 969 injured from US-Israeli strikes on residential areas. One of the highest single-area casualty counts of the war.

latest_news.headline: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
latest_news.text: Palestinian group Hamas has publicly called on Iran to stop attacking neighboring Gulf states, while affirming Tehran's right to defend itself from US and Israeli 'aggression.' Extraordinary pressure from Iran's key proxy ally.

latest_news.headline: IRGC orders evacuation of Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Fujairah ports — calls UAE 'legitimate targets'
latest_news.text: IRGC issued circular ordering UAE residents to evacuate Jebel Ali (Dubai), Khalifa Port (Abu Dhabi), and Mina Al-Fujairah. Statement: 'targets the origin of American enemy missiles.' Unprecedented direct threat to Gulf state territory.

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 9 ballistic missiles + 33 drones from Iran in massive barrage
latest_news.text: UAE air defences intercepted 9 Iranian ballistic missiles and 33 drones on Saturday. Combined 42-projectile barrage — Iran's largest attack on Gulf state territory since war began.

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan claims killed 14 Pakistani soldiers, captured border post
latest_news.text: Afghanistan's MoD claims border forces in Kunar and Nangarhar killed 14 Pakistani soldiers and captured a military post. Pakistan has not confirmed or denied. If true, major escalation.

latest_news.headline: Israel 'massive' Lebanon ground invasion confirmed — 'do what we did in Gaza'
latest_news.source: Axios / Times of Israel / Al Bawaba
latest_news.text: Senior Israeli official: 'We are going to do what we did in Gaza.' Israel seizing entire area south of Litani River. 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced. No ceasefire in sight.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 76% IMMINENT (Day 15 19:00). THREE NEW DEVELOPMENTS: (1) Iran now attacking KUWAIT — third Gulf state targeted (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait). Two drones hit Kuwaiti air base. Iran's campaign is expanding geographically. (2) SIXTH WAVE of Iranian strikes confirmed Saturday — sustained multi-axis assault showing no fatigue. (3) 112 killed in Iran's Kurdistan — massive civilian death toll from US-Israeli strikes may fuel Iranian domestic mobilization and harden resolve. (4) HAMAS urges Iran to halt Gulf attacks — extraordinary break from Iran's key proxy. Signals Arab world may be fracturing over Iran's Gulf targeting strategy. SEVEN trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (80), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Kuwait escalation cycle — will Iran strike Kuwait again? (b) Hamas break with Iran strategy — wider Arab distancing? (c) Kurdistan civilian toll — 112 dead may trigger domestic Iranian rally effect. (d) Pakistan response to Afghan soldier kill claim — still pending, potential trigger. (e) Oil price trajectory — Fujairah offline + Kharg Island struck + Kuwait hit = severe supply disruption. (f) Lebanon ground invasion intensification.
